notes: Reclassified from BUILD to operations.provisioning_debug. Session is entirely about repairing broken Ansible provisioning on mac-mini-m2: Claude not found after SSH, Node missing, Node version divergence across M4 (24.13.0) vs M2 (22.14.0). Run/fail/paste cycle across 14 user prompts in 43 minutes. Frustration burst cluster in minutes 2-4 (4 rapid short angry prompts). Agent reads playbook files (Read x9) and patches them (Edit x4). Minor feature addition (add tmux) at end. Post-session summary prompts (~2h later) are a new pattern — David asking Claude to describe the session, likely for documentation. Committed next day via commit skill. Key classifier signals: (1) ansible cwd + pasted playbook output in prompts = operations not BUILD, (2) frustration burst = operational failure signal, (3) cross-machine state divergence question. Proposed new type: operations.provisioning_debug.
